title: Blaze Client
description: Open source Minecraft utility mod for PvP servers and more!
body:
Blaze Client

A 1.9+ customizable utility mod for PvP servers and more!


[Discord](https://discord.gg/FfJUNukAnz) | [GitHub](https://github.com/BlazeClient/BlazeClient-mod)

Blaze Client is a good alternative to other clients such as Lunar, Feather, Badlion etc. It is customizable, lightweight and easy to use.


*You can view all the features and other info below:*

Features

Mod List ### Mods include, but not limited to: - FPS - CPS - Ping - Keystrokes - Reach Display - Coordinates - Server IP - Toggle Sprint - Toggle Sneak - Hurt Cam - Potion Status - Arrow Count - Pot Count - Totem Count - Armor Status - Crosshair - Nametags - Zoom - Hit Color - Hitbox - Freelook - Time - Time Changer
Other Features ### Some other features our client has: - Discord RPC - Badges for players who also use the client - Custom launcher for the client
Dependencies ### Dependencies 1.19+: [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
FAQ ### FAQ - Q: What versions do you support?
A: At the moment, only 1.19.4-1.20.4. When newer versions release, we will usually add support for them as soon as possible. We do not plan on supporting older versions. - Q: When will you add more versions?
A: In future we will! You can suggest the versions you want to be added in our [Discord](https://discord.gg/FfJUNukAnz) - Q: What operating systems do you support?
A: Windows and Linux. MacOS support is coming soon. - Q: What mods does it have?
A: You can see that above. - Q: Where can I get support about the client?
A: Check out our [Discord](https://discord.gg/FfJUNukAnz)
Disclaimers ### Disclaimers The client does network requests to be able to display cosmetics, client user badges and to check updates.
